glue.workflow.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Glue::Workflow` is an AWS Glue resource type that manages AWS Glue workflows. A workflow is a container for a set of related jobs, crawlers, and triggers in AWS Glue. Using a workflow, you can design a complex multi-job extract, transform, and load (ETL) activity that AWS Glue can execute and track as single entity.

glue.workflow.DefaultRunProperties.Description: A collection of properties to be used as part of each execution of the workflow

glue.workflow.Name.Description: The name of the workflow representing the flow

glue.workflow.Tags.Description: The tags to use with this workflow.
